subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! The glances of thy Lord's loving-kindness have been directed towards thee, inasmuch as thou hast believed in God when He came with the Kingdom of verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی قد توجهت الیک لحظات عنایه ربک بما آمنت بالله اذ اتی بملکوت الایات و
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital
